howItWorks.intro: This proxy war cost estimator by conflict uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Total cost = annual sponsor cost × years of involvement
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Why do countries fight proxy wars?
faq.answer: Proxy wars let nations project power without the political cost of deploying their own troops. They're typically 5-20x cheaper than direct military action and carry less domestic political risk, though they often last much longer.

faq.question: Is the Proxy War Cost Estimator by Conflict free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What proxy conflict should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate proxy conflict value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Proxy War Cost Estimator by Conflict is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the Proxy War Cost Estimator by Conflict?
sections.body: The Proxy War Cost Estimator by Conflict is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your proxy conflict, years of involvement, you get instant results including sponsor annual cost, total spent, estimated casualties. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting sponsor annual cost right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your proxy conflict and need to find the right sponsor annual cost. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Proxy Conflict
howToSteps.description: Type or select your proxy conflict in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Years of Involvement
howToSteps.description: Type or select your years of involvement in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your sponsor annual cost, total spent, estimated casualties. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your proxy conflict before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both sponsor annual cost and total spent — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to understand global dynamics.
If you're unsure about your years of involvement, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
